payload.label: couch
payload.long_description: Front-facing black/dark-brown leather three-seat couch with segmented padded seat and back cushions, vertical stitching, visible creases and a glossy sheen; arm consoles with cupholder/controls are partially visible at the sides and the left and right edges of the couch are slightly cropped — appears about 1.5 m from the camera.
